commands.review_summary:
The branch extracts gateway protocol and client runtime code into private workspace packages and updates related build, docs, tests, CI, label, ownership, and package metadata.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers by source inspection: PR head shows the public SDK export pointing at packages/gateway-protocol/src while package metadata ships dist only, and CI/ownership maps omit packages/gateway-client/src. I did not run build or live gateway tests because this review is read-only.
